'''Hoolidan Keggle''' was the [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Chief Representative Officer]] of [[Jyvus Space City]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
Keggle, a noted scholar, criticized [[TriPlanetary Press/Legends|TriPlanetary Press]] and the ''[[Encyclopedia Galactica]]'' for marking the [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidians]] as merely Duros, pointing out physical, genetic, and cultural differences.

During the [[Battle of Duro (Clone Wars)|Battle of Duro]], Keggle fled to the surface of [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] after the attack on Jyvus. [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] located Keggle and "negotiated" Duro's entry into the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].
